sglang.title: Fix cache modules of triton import error
sglang.author: kkHuang-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When triton version is newer than v-3.3.1, some functions of cache module will not exist.
It will cause the import error in run-time.
Modifications
Check the attributes existed or not and assign default value in non-exist case.

sglang.title: fix: Handles input_embeds in GenerateReqInput when n>1
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

fix #7807


Modifications

This change ensures that input_embeds are correctly processed when converting single inputs to batch inputs, especially when parallel sampling (n > 1) is used. It also includes a test case to verify the correct behavior.
Also fix rid validation and add test_io_

sglang.title: [Multimodal][Perf] Use `pybase64` instead of `base64`
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Improve performance of Base64 operations by replacing the standard base64 module with pybase64, which provides a SIMD-accelerated C extension. Benchmarks show up to 28× faster decoding and 9× faster encoding compared to the standard library.
Modifications

Replaced all imports and usage o

sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
0.1.20 Release Log
Summary
Fix Windows build flags for Torch extensions
Refactor the Parser and FSM libraries for improved maintainability
Expose accept_string and print_internal_states with configurable max recursion depth
Correct acceptance of certain invalid characters in JSON strings
Make tiktok

sglang.title: [CPU]convert topk_weights to fp32 for INT8 and FP8 paths (for llama4) and fix LmHead weight pack
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation



Convert topk_weights to fp32 for INT8 and FP8 paths since the CPU kernel requires it to be fp32.
Previously we've fixed this issue in BF16 path for llama4. The same fix is needed for INT8 and FP8.

  
    
      sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/fused_moe_triton/layer.py

vllm.title: [PD][Nixl] Remote consumer READ timeout for clearing request blocks
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
With #19223, we're addressing most of the cases where P request blocks may be left starving.
However, there are still cases where if the router fails to communicate request abortion for whatever reason (eg in-flight request lost, router down..) while the request has not yet reached D or D fails to c

vllm.title: Remove unnecessary explicit title anchors and use relative links instead
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Title anchors are not needed since we can use relative links to the .md files themselves
Using relative links to the .md files is better because:

It makes the links work when browsing the raw .md docs
The IDE can help identify dead links

vllm.title: Stop using title frontmatter and fix doc that can only be reached by search
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Title frontmatter was only used so that the explicit anchors for level 1 headings could be used. Since these have been removed in #20620, the frontmatter is no longer necessary
update_pytorch_version.md was not included in docs/.nav.yml, so it could only be reached by search. It has been moved into

vllm.title: Replace `multiply_add` with `homogeneous_multiply_add` to Address Clang Template Parameter Issue
vllm.author: wenxin0319
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Replaced the multiply_add template with homogeneous_multiply_add in the codebase to address a known Clang issue where template template parameters with one template parameter do not match classes that take multiple template parameters with defaults.

vllm/__vllm_cpp_lib__/buck-headers

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix the size of batched_dummy_mm_inputs in profile_run
vllm.author: linitra24
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I think that when calculating the maximum number of mm_items, the floor division should be used instead of the ceiling division, otherwise, the input length of dummy_mm_inputs may exceed the encoder_budget. Additionally, dummy_mm_kwargs should be obtained based on max_tokens_per_mm_item, not max_num
